module.name: comparetable
module.description: Feature-comparison table with ✓ / ✗ cells. First section = header row (Feature, plans…); each following section = a feature row.
module.aiSpec:
A FEATURE COMPARISON table (plans, products, options) that turns yes/no cells into green ✓ / grey ✗ automatically. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`. The FIRST section is the header row; every following section is a feature row. Within a row, separate the cells with ` | ` (pipe). A cell of `yes`/`y`/`true`/`✓`/`o` becomes a check; `no`/`n`/`false`/`✗`/`x`/`-` a grey cross; anything else is shown as text (Markdown inline). For a two-panel prose contrast use @compare instead.
Parameters: • color (color, default var(--accent-color)) — header background / rule color. • highlight (integer ≥ 0, default 0) — 1-based data column to highlight; 0 = none. • align (select: left | center | right, default center) — alignment of data cells. • markcolor (color, default #16a34a) — color of the ✓ check marks. • zebra (boolean, default false) — shade alternate body rows.
Example: <!-- @comparetable highlight: 2, zebra: true --> Feature | Free | Pro Projects | 1 | Unlimited SSO | no | yes Support | Community | Priority <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Comparison table (✓/✗)
snippet.text: <!-- @comparetable highlight: 2 --> Feature | Free | Pro Projects | 1 | Unlimited SSO | no | yes Priority support | no | yes <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: First section = header row; rows use ` | `. yes/no become ✓/✗.
